findings.description: The image `requestDumpToolAbstract.png` belongs to the parent h2 section「使用方法」in the source, not to the h3 sub-section「前提条件」. The source places the image immediately under「使用方法」as an overview diagram of the entire tool flow, before any sub-sections begin. By placing the image inside s3 (前提条件), an AI reading this section would incorrectly associate the tool flow overview diagram with the prerequisites topic rather than the overall usage workflow. The parent「使用方法」section has no corresponding knowledge section, and its only substantive content (the diagram) was merged into the wrong child section.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 使用方法 section contains「下記の図に沿って、本ツールの使用方法を説明する。」followed by the image, all before the 前提条件 sub-section begins.
